transcript.text:
My grandmother took my mother here And my mother took me here
So it's a place I've known for a while since I was little
[With 45 years of tradition] [Soongin Market's Snack Bar]
[Same location Same looks]
It's been here since 1976 That's 45 years
Back then, they would wait in long lines just to get a bite
[Inhaling the Spicy Rice Cake]
2 more orders, please
2 more orders again, please
[Today's Spicy Rice Cake thief]
Other people can't eat like that
Hello everyone~
Today, I am at
The Soongin Market located on the Mia-4-way-street
This place has been here since my grandmother's generation
There's a snack bar here that sells my favorite Spicy Rice Cake

It's called Jaeil Snack Bar
My grandma used to come here
Let's go there now
[Almost time to close and they're still busy]
1 order of fishcake soup and What kind of tempuras do you guys have?
Fried Seaweed and Fried Squid, And also bloody pork sausage, please
The rice cake is very chewy
I love it so much
Is this 3 servings? 2 servings
Thank you
2,000 Won for the Spicy Rice Cake, Fishcake soup, Fried tempura They're all mostly 2,000 Won (~$1.82 USD)
They used to be 1,500 Won when I was younger (~$1.37 USD)
Considered very cheap
Bon appetit
[You need to have the fried tempura, spicy rice cake, and the bloody sausage]
It's so good

It's a bit spicy
I can taste the gochujang (red chili pepper paste) taste And some sweetness
It's different from the ones in front of the schools
This place has its own distinct taste
It's really tasty
It's always crowded here
You would have to come in the morning to avoid the crowd
So good
Fried tempura
Tasty
They close at 9 o'clock
They're closing soon, but there's no room to sit inside
The fishcake soup is so good
So good
[You can use the Spicy Rice Cake sauce for anything]
[Even the bloody sausage]

Can't let the sauce go to waste
4 pieces of rice cake
[4 rice cakes with 1 bite]
It's so crispy
Yummy
[Chat: Is the rice cake made from rice?] (TMI: There are different ways to make the rice cake)
Is this a flour rice cake?
It's rice 100% rice
Really?
I never knew that it was rice-rice cake
[As long as it's yummy]
[Checking the grill]
They're not finishing up, right?
Please
No
[You stay right there]

[Anxious]
Is this your last batch?
I'm going to make more
That's a relief
Thank you
This is jjolmyeon (Cold Spicy Chewy Noodles) It's 4,000 Won (~$3.64 USD)
It's the best
[In goes their special sauce]
I make that every morning
I come out at 3 a.m.
You come at 3 in the morning to prepare the sauce?
[Full of geniunity]
[Flex Flex] [There's a reason why it tastes good]
It's really good
[Let's hurry and order more]
[Tempura plate is cleared]

[1 big bite of the noodles]
[Down with the spicy rice cake as well]
Excuse me,
Can I have 2 more orders here?
[Freshly made Spicy Rice Cake]
There are these long pieces sometimes
The ones that were not cut
[Very nice]
I'm not sure if this is the right timing
It tastes better when it's been sitting here for a while
rather than the fresh one
It's all luck
It's really spicy
It got spicy
It's like sweet and spicy, but it builds up as you eat
Is there something that can cool it down?

Fried sweet potatoes
Excuse me, can I have Fried Sweet Potatoes?
Thank you
This tastes good too
I don't really eat this that often
Yum
I want to eat it all, but it's spicy
I would've eaten everything here if it wasn't spicy
Spicy!
It's spicy, but I can't stop because it's so good
2 more orders of Spicy Rice Cake, please What!?
You finished that already?
[We won't have leftovers today]
It's spicy~
Thank you
Every time I came here with my mother,

We would always to-go some after we ate here
After we take it home,
We eat it again after letting it sit for a while It's different and delicious
[Am I forgetting something?]
6 servings of the Spicy Rice Cake, 1 serving of Fried Tempura, 1 serving of Fried Sweet Potatoes, 1 serving of the Chewy Noodles, 1 serving of the bloody sausage
Oh Kimbap (Seaweed Roll)
Excuse me, 1 order of Kimbap, please
Such a small lady eating so much
Thank you
Mini Kimbap
These are also 2,000 Won
They're going to be closing soon
These Spicy Rice Cake are very popular
It's really tasty
But it's different for everything
It's really tasty for me

Not sure about other people
I would've continued eating
if it wasn't too spicy
I wonder how much the bill will come out to
[She just had 11 servings]
It's at 24,000 Won right now!? (~$21.85 USD)
[Cooling down the spiciness]
1 more order of the Fried Sweet Potatoes, please
Aren't you going to get sick?
I will be fine
I don't really eat these, but they taste really good
Yum
Eating so much with such a small body
I will end it soon
[Seeing what she ordered]
Was that right?

[Closing Time]
She eats a lot
Other people can't do it
4 to 5 servings is the limit
[She ate 12 servings]
[Final] [Speed Up]
[Cleared]
[Calculating]
The total comes out to be 26,000 Won (~$23.67 USD)
That's really cheap
Even at really cheap places, the total always comes out to be at least 50,000 for me
But 26,000 Won is really.. wow
BRB I'm going to pay
Excuse me, the bill
[Come again]
